DISCOVERY, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE AUG-31-2021 HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.'S MOTION TO DEEM REQUESTS FOR ADMISSIONS ADMITTED (CCP 2033.280), THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING WITH THE MODIFICATION OF CLARIFYING THE REQUESTING PARTY AND THE RESPONDING PARTY. PLAINTIFF'S MOTION IS GRANTED. (SEE MINI-MINUTES FOR DETAILS.) COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF IS TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER CONSISTENT WITH THE COURT'S RULING, SUBMIT A COPY TO DEFENDANT FOR APPROVAL AS TO FORM, AND EMAIL A COPY TO THE JUDGE PRO TEM AT RENNEPAR85@GMAIL.COM. JUDGE PRO TEM: PAUL RENNE; CLERK: SEAN KANE; NOT REPORTED. (302/JPT)

calendar.matters:
Motion To Deem Requests For Admissions Admitted (Ccp 2033.280) Points And Authorities; Declaration
Off Calendar Aug-31-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. FLINT ZIDE, Esq. of Law Offices of Harris & Zide (Tel: 626-799-8444) for plaintiff;
No other appearances made in this matter.

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.'s Motion To Deem Requests For Admissions Admitted (CCP 2033.280).

Plaintiff stipules to the matter being decided by the Judge Pro Tem. The Judge Pro Tem and counsel for plaintiff (both appearing remotely) authorize the clerk to sign the formal stipulation form on their behalf.

Matter discussed. The Court adopts its tentative ruling with the modification of clarifying the requesting party and the responding party, as follows:

PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA'S MOTION TO HAVE REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION DEEMED ADMITTED IS UNOPPOSED. ACCORDINGLY, THE COURT WILL ENTER THE FOLLOWING ORDER:
(1) DEFENDANT HAS TEN (10) DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER TO DELIVER TO PLAINTIFF WITHOUT OBJECTION HIS CODE COMPLIANT RESPONSES TO PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR ADMISSION.
(2) IF DEFENDANT FAILS TO COMPLY WITH PARAGRAPH (1) ABOVE THE REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION WILL BE DEEMED ADMITTED AND DEFENDANT WILL BE PRECLUDED FOR INTRODUCING ANY EVIDENCE TO CONTRADICT THE ADMISSION.

Counsel for plaintiff is to prepare and submit a proposed order consistent with the Court's ruling, submit a copy to defendant for approval as to form, and email a copy to the Judge Pro Tem at rennepar85@gmail.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Paul Renne; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)
